# crypto

```go
import "github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/common/crypto"
```

Package crypto wraps the hashing and Ed25519 signature primitives used throughout the chain, VM, and wallet layers.

### Overview

crypto provides BLAKE2b hashing, Ed25519 sign/verify, and helpers for deriving addresses from public keys.

Per\-package documentation is being filled in incrementally. See docs/STYLE.md for the full template applied in subsequent PRs.
